scripts.dev: NEXT_DIST_DIR=.next-dev node ./scripts/with-root-env.mjs corepack pnpm exec next dev
scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @clocked/db run generate && node ./scripts/with-root-env.mjs corepack pnpm exec next build
scripts.start: node ./scripts/with-root-env.mjs corepack pnpm exec next start
